context.projectOverview: agent-bober chat session layer. Sprint 3 adds rotation-safe completion weaving: the chat session tails .bober/history.jsonl to detect when a spawned run completes and weaves that completion into a later chat turn, surviving log rotation/truncation.

completedSprints.title: Chat REPL that answers
completedSprints.summary: src/chat/ module + chat role + bober chat command. ConversationStore JSONL resume, RosterReader over readRunStatesFromDisk.

completedSprints.title: Detached spawn + --run-id
completedSprints.summary: RunSpawner launches detached bober run with session-generated runId via --run-id; PidSidecar at .bober/chat/<sessionId>.pids.json; spawn branch wired into ChatSession.
